# copick process

*Apply processing methods to copick data.*

## Usage

```bash
copick process [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

## Description

Commands in this group apply image-processing operations, such as filtering,
denoising, or intensity transforms, to copick tomograms and related entities.
Subcommands are contributed by installed plugins.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`bandpass`](bandpass.md) | 3D bandpass filter tomograms. |
| [`combine`](combine.md) | Combine single-label segmentations into a multilabel segmentation. |
| [`downsample`](downsample.md) | Downsample tomograms with Fourier Re-Scaling. |
| [`expand-labels`](expand-labels.md) | Expand labels in segmentations to fill holes and gaps. |
| [`filter-components`](filter-components.md) | Filter connected components in segmentations by size. |
| [`fit-spline`](fit-spline.md) | Fit 3D splines to skeletons and generate oriented picks. |
| [`hull`](hull.md) | Compute hull operations on meshes. |
| [`rescale`](rescale.md) | Rescale segmentations to a different voxel spacing. |
| [`seg-stats`](seg-stats.md) | Analyze connected component sizes per label in segmentations. |
| [`separate-components`](separate-components.md) | Separate connected components in segmentations. |
| [`skeletonize`](skeletonize.md) | Skeletonize segmentations in 3D using pattern matching. |
| [`split`](split.md) | Split multilabel segmentations into single-class masks. |
| [`thickness-filter`](thickness-filter.md) | Remove thin regions from segmentations. |
| [`validbox`](validbox.md) | Generate valid area box meshes for tomographic reconstructions. |
